description_long: This is a single, dark brown leather ankle boot with a visibly worn and aged appearance. The upper is constructed from thick leather, featuring prominent double-stitched seams along the sides and around the toe box. The shoe lacks laces, exposing empty eyelets and an open tongue area, suggesting it is either missing its laces or designed as a slip-on. The sole is thick and rugged, likely made of rubber, with a visible tread pattern for grip. The heel is slightly raised, and the back of the shoe shows creasing and scuff marks, indicating significant use. No visible branding or logos are present, and the overall condition suggests the shoe has seen extensive wear in urban environments.
description: A dark brown, heavily worn leather ankle boot with double-stitched seams, missing laces, and a thick, rugged sole. The shoe shows significant creasing and scuffing, with no visible branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, double-stitched seams, and the absence of laces.
description_view_1: Front-angled view highlighting the open tongue area and empty eyelets.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same stitched details and the thick sole.
description_view_3: Rear-angled view showing the creased heel and scuffed back surface.
